{{Quote|The Yinchorr citadel instructs members of Palpatine's personal Royal Guard, while smaller complexes train officers of the Imperial riot troopers and other stormtrooper divisions. It is doubtful you are cleared to know more than general information about this institution.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wullf Yularen/Legends|Wullf Yularen]], ''[[Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]''|<ref name="Handbook">''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]''</ref>}}
The '''Imperial Royal Guard Academy''', also known as the '''Imperial Academy of Yinchorr''', was a training academy established by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]], to train the [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guard]]. It also served to train officers of the [[Riot stormtrooper/Legends|riot stormtroopers]] and other [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] divisions; they were trained in the complex surrounding the Imperial Guard academy. In large part because of the importance of the Emperor's Royal Guard and their ties to the academy, specific information on the location was considered highly classified, to such an extent that not even officers within the Imperial Military who had high-enough rank to be allowed access to the ''[[Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]'', the official field manual for the military forces in the Empire, were likely to have the clearance level to know anything about the academy beyond generalities.<ref name="Handbook" /> Upon graduation, students of the [[Academy]] were required to swear the [[Oath of Obedience]].<ref name="TFUII">''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]'' {{C|[[Wikipedia:PlayStation 3|PS3]]/[[Wikipedia:Xbox 360|Xbox 360]] "[[Riot stormtrooper/Legends|Riot Trooper]]" databank entry}}</ref>

During a yearlong training program, recruits sparred against each other continuously to perfect their combat skills. By working both alone and in pairs, recruits learned how to rely on themselves or on a teammate to achieve victory, a step away from the squad-based stormtrooper training received on [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]. Failure in training often meant [[Death/Legends|death]]. During their final test, trainees fought each other to the death in an arena called "[[The Squall/Legends|The Squall]]" before [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] himself. Only a handful would survive this final test in a display of their loyalty and skill.

==Behind the scenes==
The Imperial Royal Guard Academy first appeared in the comic series ''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire]]''.<ref name="ce 1" /> An "Imperial Academy of Yinchorr" was first mentioned in the "Riot Trooper" entry in the in-game databank of the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 3]]/[[Wikipedia:Xbox 360|Xbox 360]] versions of ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]'', a [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] released in [[2010]],<ref name="TFUII" /> though it was not until the [[2014]] ''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]'' that the two were confirmed to be the same.<ref name="Handbook" />
